title: KQOffice V2 W4 Select-to-Act Inline Action Request
description: Per-trigger envelope written by the W4 popover when a user picks an action from the inline floating bubble (Writer paragraph / Calc cell / Impress slide-element). Distinct from apply-plan-runtime (the *output* of an action) and provider-evidence (the per-call audit). One JSON record per popover dispatch; the same record is replayable for testing. Locked by W4 spec §'Action enum lock' (ParagraphAction 7-token, CellAction 5-token, SlideElementAction 4-token).

schema_version.description: Envelope schema version. Bumped only when a non-additive change lands. Day-0 ships v2-w4-1.

request_id.description: Per-trigger unique id. 16-hex like provider-evidence's evidence_id.

surface.description: Which W4 surface raised the popover. Order locked: matches W4-A/W4-B/W4-C section order in the spec.

action.description: ASCII kebab-case action token. Must be one of the per-surface enums; validity is asserted via the per-surface oneOf branches, not a single union enum here, so cross-surface drift fails informatively.

target.description: Surface-specific target identifier. Kept open in the envelope; the per-surface oneOf locks the shape.

service_mode.description: Active ServiceModePolicy mode at trigger time. Locked at request creation; no silent escalation per W5 spec §'安全'.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at popover dispatch. Seconds precision, Z suffix.

user_prompt.description: Optional free-form prompt. Required only when action == 'custom' (Writer) — schema-level cross-field rule deferred to Day-0 C++ side.

expected_capability.description: Optional W1 capability id the popover expects to dispatch through. Skipped for popup-only actions ('explain', 'explain-data').
